concept: Network / A Web of Generative Light
description: An interconnected, often decentralized, system of relationships and resources that sustain collective flourishing. It is a living web of mutual aid and information flow.
rationale: A composition of the roots 'pha' (generative, growing), 'li' (light, clarity), and 'so' (sun, light). The word's structure suggests 'a generative web of clarifying light,' capturing the Solarpunk ideal of a network as a dynamic, illuminating, and life-sustaining structure.
